title: Set Up Observability
description: Instrument a service with metrics, logs, and traces that matter.
content:
Help me make this service observable: {{service}}

Define: the handful of metrics that actually indicate health (think RED/USE), what to log at each level, where tracing spans add value, and the 3-5 alerts worth paging on (symptom-based, not cause-based). Avoid alert noise and vanity metrics. Tell me what 'good' looks like for each signal.
